metadata.title: OpenPolis
metadata.description: Agent-native, self-hostable democratic operations infrastructure for mission-driven organizations.

validation.title: Check the submitted fields
validation.description: One or more required fields are missing or invalid.

csrf.title: Request blocked
csrf.description: This request did not pass the workspace origin security checks. Refresh the page and try again.

auth.title: Authentication required
auth.description: Sign in with a valid operator account before trying again.

forbidden.title: Permission denied
forbidden.description: The current actor is not allowed to perform this action.

not_found.title: Linked record not found
not_found.description: One of the referenced workflow records no longer exists or is unavailable.

conflict.title: State conflict detected
conflict.description: The target record changed state and this action is no longer valid.

system.title: System error
system.description: The request could not be completed because of a server-side failure.

command.title: Command palette
command.description: Search for a command to run...

header.title: AI-guided operations
header.description: One front door for priorities, follow-up, review gates, and traceable execution.

dashboard.title: Command Dashboard
dashboard.description: See the leading issues, execution pressure, regional variance, and agent support queues from a single screen.

priorities.title: Today's priorities
priorities.description: The issues that require the fastest coordination loop.

operations.title: Execution snapshot
operations.description: Open work, blocked items, and approvals that shape the current tempo.

regions.title: Regional execution
regions.description: Completion and blocker signals across the active network.

feedback.title: Escalated feedback
feedback.description: Field signals that should influence the next response cycle.

review.title: Approval queue
review.description: Review steps that still need accountable humans in the loop.

aiWorkspace.title: AI control
aiWorkspace.description: One front door for high-automation work, narrow confirmation gates, and traceable actions.

skills.title: Skill registry
skills.description: Scoped capabilities available to agents and reviewers.

issues.title: Priority Items
issues.description: The major issues, campaigns, and projects the organization is actively pushing.

assets.title: Materials & Outputs
assets.description: Drafts, notices, briefs, attachments, and reusable materials linked to live work.

briefs.title: Action Plans
briefs.description: Turn priorities into clear plans with stages, owners, deadlines, and scope.

operations.title: Task Follow-up
operations.description: Track assignments, delays, blockers, and reminders as work moves forward.

network.title: Areas & Units
network.description: See which places and offices are moving well, lagging, or need coordination help.

calendar.title: Schedule
calendar.description: Keep operational timing, meetings, events, and publication windows in one view.

feedback.title: Feedback
feedback.description: Bring local reports, public signals, and frontline updates back into execution.

review.title: Inspection & Review
review.description: Checks, corrections, approvals, and follow-through for work that needs accountability.

reports.title: Reports
reports.description: Prepare short briefs, scorecards, and export-ready summaries for follow-through.

aiWorkspace.title: AI Control
aiWorkspace.description: One front door for assignment intake, sub-agent routing, results, confirmations, and traceable action history.

skills.title: Skills
skills.description: Composable skills that stay bounded by workflow scope, permissions, and review gates.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Locale, deployment, and retention defaults aligned with self-hosted operations.

admin.title: Admin
admin.description: Policies, audit defaults, and operator boundaries for the platform core.

recordDetail.title: Selected Record
recordDetail.description: Structured context, linked objects, and governance metadata for the active record.

recordActions.title: Next Actions
recordActions.description: Move this record into the next governed workflow step without bypassing review.

briefFromIssue.title: {title} brief
briefFromIssue.summary: Turn {title} into a governed brief with goals, audience, and approval checkpoints.

assetFromIssue.title: {title} asset draft
assetFromIssue.summary: Prepare a reusable asset draft for {title} and keep it aligned with the active issue context.

taskFromIssue.title: {title} task
taskFromIssue.summary: Create an execution task for {title} with a clear owner, delivery step, and review path.

assetFromBrief.title: {title} asset draft
assetFromBrief.summary: Produce a reusable asset draft from {title} and keep the brief constraints intact.

taskFromBrief.title: {title} task
taskFromBrief.summary: Convert {title} into an execution task with clear ownership and a governed handoff.

feedbackFromTask.title: {title} feedback
feedbackFromTask.summary: Capture field or internal feedback related to {title} and route it back into the governed workflow.

docs.title: Project docs
docs.description: Principles, architecture notes, and the current implementation outline.

aiWorkspace.inputDescription: Tell the central agent what needs to be done. It will route the work, merge the outputs, and stop only at the few required confirmation gates.
aiWorkspace.promptPlaceholder: Example: summarize today's regional situation, draft a follow-up notice, and flag anything that needs my approval.
aiWorkspace.promptHelper: Quick starts fill the box with high-frequency assignments. This first visible version keeps the control desk focused on routing, results, and traceable records.

today.label: See today's situation
today.prompt: Summarize today's overall situation, highlight what changed overnight, and tell me what needs attention first.

materials.label: Organize new materials
materials.prompt: Read the new notes, reports, and attachments, then turn them into a clean summary with clear follow-up items.

tasks.label: Create tasks
tasks.prompt: Turn the latest meeting decisions into named tasks with owners, deadlines, and follow-up points.

followUp.label: Follow up delays
followUp.prompt: Find overdue work, repeated delays, and blocked handoffs, then prepare the next follow-up actions.

stats.connectedProvidersDetail: Live systems and model routes the control desk can call into.
stats.enabledSkillsDetail: Scoped capabilities the sub agents can use without widening permissions.
stats.guardedScopesDetail: Provider lanes currently held behind stricter boundaries or review rules.
stats.jobsInMotionDetail: High-value assignments the control desk is already routing across sub agents.

results.title: Main results
results.description: Prepared outputs that are ready to read, route, or act on.

activeWork.title: Active work
activeWork.description: Assignments the control desk is routing right now.

confirmations.title: Needs your confirmation
confirmations.description: Keep this queue short. Only the highest-consequence actions stop here.

evidence.title: Evidence and record
evidence.description: Every important result should have a visible trail behind it.

agents.title: Sub-agent seats
agents.description: Each agent has a narrow job, a bounded role, and a clear contribution to the control desk.

readiness.title: System readiness
readiness.description: Ground the control desk in the providers and skills already available in this workspace.

created.title: Assignment sent
created.description: The control desk logged the assignment and routed it into the agent queue.

error.title: Assignment failed
error.description: Check the request and try again.

responseCreated.title: Decision recorded
responseCreated.description: The human decision was written to the agent record and the queue refreshed.

responseError.title: Decision failed
responseError.description: The confirmation could not be recorded. Try again.

results.title: No finished agent runs yet
results.description: New assignments appear in active work first. Finished runs will show up here after the execution layer closes them.

activeWork.title: No work is moving right now
activeWork.description: Send one line of work to the control desk and the live assignment will appear here.

confirmations.title: Nothing is waiting for confirmation
confirmations.description: High-consequence actions will stop here instead of being executed silently.

dynamic.pendingSummary: {skill} is queued through the {provider} lane and will start once the current slot opens.
dynamic.runningSummary: {skill} is handling this assignment through the {provider} lane.
dynamic.waitingSummary: {skill} prepared the next step through {provider} and paused for human review before continuing.
dynamic.completedSummary: {skill} finished this assignment and logged the result.
dynamic.failedSummary: {skill} could not finish this assignment and needs inspection.
dynamic.cancelledSummary: This assignment was stopped and kept in the record for traceability.
dynamic.requiresApproval: This stopped here because the assignment can change records, permissions, or outbound actions.

briefing.title: Morning situation brief
briefing.summary: Merging regional movement, late tasks, and field updates into one short leadership picture.
briefing.meta: Summary agent leading, risk and governance checks attached.

followUp.title: Delay follow-up pass
followUp.summary: Checking stalled tasks, repeated slippage, and which units need the next reminder or escalation.
followUp.meta: Waiting on the final bounded handoff list before pushing reminders.

feedback.title: Field signal digest
feedback.summary: Reading fresh local updates, grouping repeated signals, and separating noise from issues worth escalation.
feedback.meta: Intake queue is still processing the newest batch of reports.

morning.title: Today's operating picture is prepared
morning.summary: A short morning brief is ready with the leading priority, the slowest units, and the first issues that need attention.
morning.meta: Includes regional movement, fresh exceptions, and a short action order.

delays.title: Delay follow-up packet is ready
delays.summary: A draft internal follow-up list is prepared for late tasks, blocked handoffs, and units that missed the last response window.
delays.meta: Prepared for the task follow-up lane with the reminder wording already drafted.

field.title: Field feedback digest is clustered
field.summary: The latest field, media, and office reports are grouped into signal clusters so humans do not need to read every raw note.
field.meta: High-noise updates were collapsed, with escalation candidates pulled to the top.

release.title: Release internal follow-up notice
release.summary: The control desk prepared a follow-up notice tied to the latest delay packet.
release.reason: This stops here because it would trigger a formal internal instruction.

permissions.title: Approve a tighter agent scope
permissions.summary: A provider path is requesting a narrower permission profile before the next automated pass.
permissions.reason: This stops here because permission changes should never be applied silently.

activity.title: Today's agent activity
activity.summary: See which jobs were opened, which sub agents ran, and what they touched.

changes.title: Recent state changes
changes.summary: Trace which tasks, statuses, and linked records changed after agent work ran.

guardrails.title: Guardrail checks
guardrails.summary: Inspect the rule paths, skills, and scope checks used before sensitive actions.

intake.name: Intake Agent
intake.summary: Turns rough notes, reports, and message fragments into structured work objects.

task.name: Task Agent
task.summary: Converts goals and decisions into owners, deadlines, dependencies, and reminders.

drafting.name: Drafting Agent
drafting.summary: Builds notices, briefings, summaries, and follow-up drafts from live records and templates.

summary.name: Summary Agent
summary.summary: Turns many updates into a short picture that a human can read in one pass.

risk.name: Risk Agent
risk.summary: Flags repeated delays, sudden spikes, weak follow-through, and issues worth escalation.

governance.name: Governance Guard
governance.summary: Applies scope rules, review gates, and sensitivity checks before higher-risk execution.

onboarding.title: Initialize the first operator
onboarding.description: Create the first real operator account before protected workspace routes can be used.

initialRole.title: Initial assignment preset
initialRole.description: The first operator is created with the central ops preset so it can bootstrap the workspace and invite additional operators.

signIn.title: Operator sign-in
signIn.description: Authenticate an operator session before reading or mutating governed workspace records.

notConfigured.title: Operator auth is not configured
notConfigured.description: Set BETTER_AUTH_SECRET and BETTER_AUTH_URL to enable Better Auth-backed operator sessions.

status.title: Current actor
status.description: Review the actor source that will be applied to governed reads and writes for this browser.

active.title: Authenticated session active
active.description: This browser is using a Better Auth operator session.

inactive.title: No authenticated session
inactive.bootstrapDescription: Operator auth is not configured, so requests still use the local bootstrap actor.
inactive.onboardingDescription: Operator auth is configured, but no operator account exists yet. Initialize the first operator account to unlock protected workspace routes.
inactive.enforcedDescription: Operator auth is configured, so unauthenticated workspace routes redirect here and workflow commands stay blocked until sign-in.

initialized.title: Operator initialized
initialized.description: The first operator account was created and signed in for this browser.

signed_in.title: Signed in
signed_in.description: A Better Auth operator session was created for this browser.

signed_out.title: Signed out
signed_out.description: The operator session was cleared from this browser.

error.title: Sign-in failed
error.description: Check the submitted account details and Better Auth configuration, then try again.

created.title: Operator account created
created.description: The new operator account is ready for email and password sign-in.

notConfigured.title: Better Auth is not configured
notConfigured.description: Operator account management is only available after Better Auth session support is configured.

denied.title: Operator management is restricted
denied.description: Only central ops or super admin operators can create additional operator accounts.

create.title: Create operator account
create.description: Provision a new operator account and attach one of the supported assignment presets.

accounts.title: Operator accounts
accounts.description: Review the real operator accounts currently provisioned in Better Auth.

loadError.title: Unable to load operator accounts
loadError.description: The admin surface loaded, but Better Auth account records could not be retrieved.

empty.title: No operator accounts
empty.description: Create the first operator account to establish governed access.

issueIntake.title: Quick issue capture
issueIntake.description: Capture a new issue as task-ready information and route it into the governed workflow.

summary.label: Issue summary
summary.placeholder: Describe the response context, pressure, or next action

created.title: Issue captured
created.description: The new issue was stored and added to the issues queue.

error.title: Issue capture failed
error.description: Check the required fields and try again.

briefIntake.title: Create brief
briefIntake.description: Capture a structured brief that can move into review and execution without rebuilding the context.

summary.label: Brief summary
summary.placeholder: Describe the goal, constraints, and expected output

created.title: Brief created
created.description: The new brief was stored and added to the briefs queue.

error.title: Brief creation failed
error.description: Check the required fields and try again.

assetDraft.title: Create asset draft
assetDraft.description: Create a new asset draft that can move into approval without leaving the workspace.

summary.label: Asset summary
summary.placeholder: Describe the material, audience, or intended use

created.title: Draft created
created.description: The asset draft was stored and added to the assets queue.

error.title: Draft creation failed
error.description: Check the required fields and try again.

approvalSubmit.title: Submit approval
approvalSubmit.description: Open a human review request for an existing asset by referencing its asset code.

assetCode.label: Asset code
assetCode.placeholder: Enter the asset code from the assets queue

created.title: Review submitted
created.description: The approval request was created and added to the review queue.

error.title: Review submission failed
error.description: Check the asset code and required fields before trying again.

approvalResponse.title: Respond to approval
approvalResponse.description: Record a human decision on an approval request that was created in the governed workflow.

created.title: Decision recorded
created.description: The approval record was updated and the review queue refreshed.

error.title: Decision failed
error.description: Check the selected approval and try again.

taskIntake.title: Create task
taskIntake.description: Create an execution task with a clear priority so the operations queue can absorb it immediately.

summary.label: Task summary
summary.placeholder: Describe the delivery expectation or blocker context

created.title: Task created
created.description: The task was stored and added to the operations queue.

error.title: Task creation failed
error.description: Check the required fields and try again.

feedbackIntake.title: Capture feedback
feedbackIntake.description: Capture a field or internal signal and route it into the feedback queue with a severity level.

summary.label: Feedback summary
summary.placeholder: Describe the signal, blocker, or escalation context

created.title: Feedback captured
created.description: The feedback record was stored and added to the feedback queue.

error.title: Feedback capture failed
error.description: Check the required fields and try again.

youth_participation.title: Youth participation program

budget_oversight.title: Budget oversight response
budget_oversight.summary: Prepare public-facing clarifications for the next oversight hearing.

rapid_response_pack.summary: Core response graphics and quote cards for active issue windows.

regional_video_template.summary: Localized motion template for district-level briefing clips.

candidate_brief_card.summary: Short-form factsheet for candidate teams and surrogates.

municipal_listening_tour.title: Municipal listening tour brief
municipal_listening_tour.summary: Audience framing and FAQ requirements for the next field sequence.

housing_response_brief.title: Housing response brief
housing_response_brief.summary: Context, constraints, and approval gates for public-facing answers.

volunteer_onboarding_wave.title: Volunteer onboarding wave
volunteer_onboarding_wave.summary: Training materials, local routing, and reporting expectations.

review_publish_cycle.title: Review and publish cycle
review_publish_cycle.summary: Move approved issue materials through the final release queue.

field_training_pack.title: Field training pack
field_training_pack.summary: Assemble materials and reviewer notes for regional training leads.

volunteer_route_sync.title: Volunteer route sync
volunteer_route_sync.summary: Update handoff coverage for the next neighborhood wave.

north_network.title: North network
north_network.summary: Strong completion pace with one unresolved media blocker.

coastal_district.summary: Localized materials are ready, but task routing is lagging.

inland_coalition.summary: Volunteer coverage is improving after the last coordination handoff.

policy_townhall.summary: Public issue forum tied to housing transparency messaging.

regional_press_window.title: Regional press window
regional_press_window.summary: Embargoed publication slot for localized talking points.

volunteer_orientation.title: Volunteer orientation
volunteer_orientation.summary: Introductory session for new coordinators and field responders.

media_question_queue.title: Media question queue
media_question_queue.summary: A cluster of follow-up questions needs a refreshed approved answer.

local_office_blocker.title: Local office blocker
local_office_blocker.summary: A region is missing approved assets for the next event window.

volunteer_signal_cluster.title: Volunteer signal cluster
volunteer_signal_cluster.summary: Field coordinators report confusion around the latest FAQ changes.

candidate_talking_points.title: Candidate talking points
candidate_talking_points.summary: Human approval is still required before external distribution.

regional_asset_bundle.title: Regional asset bundle
regional_asset_bundle.summary: Localized pack pending final legal and message consistency review.

crisis_response_note.title: Crisis response note
crisis_response_note.summary: Sensitive note needs an explicit approver before publication.

daily_command_digest.summary: Cross-module summary of issue pressure, approvals, and escalations.

weekly_region_score.summary: Compares delivery pace and blocker trends across regions.

audit_trail_export.title: Audit trail export
audit_trail_export.summary: Portable review and activity history for self-hosted governance.

issue_summarizer.title: Issue summarizer
issue_summarizer.summary: Condenses research material into structured issue updates.

brief_drafter.title: Brief drafter
brief_drafter.summary: Builds task-ready briefs from issues, audiences, and constraints.

approval_guard.title: Approval guard
approval_guard.summary: Flags missing reviewers, risky changes, and unapproved release paths.

custom_gateway.title: Custom gateway
custom_gateway.summary: OpenAI-compatible endpoint for self-hosted or proxied models.

anthropic_bridge.title: Anthropic bridge
anthropic_bridge.summary: Adapter slot for Claude tooling and bounded agent execution.

local_fallback.title: Local fallback
local_fallback.summary: Offline-safe provider slot for development and constrained deployments.

global.title: Loading workspace
global.description: Preparing the current route and fetching the latest governed data.

app.title: Loading module
app.description: Fetching records, approvals, and command context for this workspace module.

docs.title: Loading documentation
docs.description: Preparing navigation, content, and locale-specific docs metadata.

global.title: Unable to load this route
global.description: A rendering or data access error interrupted this route. Retry safely once the dependency is available again.

app.title: Unable to load this workspace module
app.description: The module shell rendered, but its latest governed data could not be loaded.

docs.title: Unable to load documentation
docs.description: The documentation route could not finish rendering for the selected locale.
